title: malaxis oblongifolia
intro: Malaxis oblongifolia, also known as the False Dendrobium, is a type of orchid native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Malaxis oblongifolia include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to promote wound healing and reduce swelling. Malaxis oblongifolia can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
